title: Review Moto One Hyper ROM source viability

preflight.note: Stamped by `repopact new`; the work item was recorded before implementation began.

acceptance_criteria.text: Source candidates are reviewed and ranked by type, branch, commit freshness, content, license status, blocker, and next action.
The sources matrix and ROM lab status report are updated with the source viability pass and first build/test recommendation.
A read-only Android build host checker is added and validation requires the new viability records.
RepoPact validation and ROM lab tests pass after the review.
No Android source tree, firmware, images, blobs, zips, bins, serials, IMEIs, unlock keys, or large binaries are committed.
No destructive or firmware-write action is performed on the physical phone.
